blocks.content: According to the number of patients registered in the OPD of health institutions under this Sub-Metropolitan City, the details of the top 10 health problems seen recently are mentioned in the table below.
Table No. 72: Details of top 10 health problems

rows: Outpatient disease - ENT Infection - Chronic Suppurative Otitis Media patients
Outpatient disease - Other infectious diseases - Upper Respiratory Tract Infection (URTI) patients
Outpatient disease - Skin disease - Fungal infection (Lichen planus) patients
OPD Morbidity - Other diseases and injuries - Headache
Outpatient disease - Other Infectious diseases - ARI / Lower Respiratory Tract Infection (LRTI) patients
